description: Error codes, handling patterns, and troubleshooting for Standard Checkout

http_status_codes.400: Bad Request — invalid parameters or payload
http_status_codes.401: Unauthorized — invalid or expired access token
http_status_codes.404: Not Found — resource does not exist
http_status_codes.422: Unprocessable Entity — valid JSON but business logic error
http_status_codes.500: Internal Server Error — PayPal system error

INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE.description: A request parameter value is invalid
INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE.resolution: Validate parameter values against API documentation

MISSING_REQUIRED_PARAMETER.resolution: Include all required fields in the request payload

AMOUNT_MISMATCH.description: Breakdown amounts do not sum to total amount
AMOUNT_MISMATCH.resolution: Ensure item_total + shipping + handling + tax_total + insurance - shipping_discount - discount = total value

DUPLICATE_INVOICE_ID.description: Invoice ID has already been used for a completed payment
DUPLICATE_INVOICE_ID.resolution: Use a unique invoice_id for each order

INSTRUMENT_DECLINED.resolution: Ask buyer to use a different payment method or contact their bank

ORDER_NOT_APPROVED.description: Buyer has not yet approved the order
ORDER_NOT_APPROVED.resolution: Wait for buyer to complete approval in PayPal before capturing

ORDER_ALREADY_CAPTURED.resolution: Check order status before attempting capture. Use idempotency keys.

PAYER_ACTION_REQUIRED.description: Buyer must take additional action before payment can complete
PAYER_ACTION_REQUIRED.resolution: Redirect buyer back to PayPal to complete required action

PERMISSION_DENIED.resolution: Enable required features in PayPal Developer Dashboard

CURRENCY_NOT_SUPPORTED.description: Currency is not supported for this merchant

MAX_NUMBER_OF_PAYMENT_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED.description: Too many payment attempts for this order
MAX_NUMBER_OF_PAYMENT_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED.resolution: Create a new order and retry

AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE.resolution: Verify credentials in PayPal Developer Dashboard

INVALID_TOKEN.description: Access token is invalid or expired

server_side.log_pattern: Always log: error message, HTTP status, debug_id, response body
server_side.user_message: Return user-friendly message, never expose internal error details

retry_strategy.backoff: Exponential backoff starting at 1 second, max 3 retries
retry_strategy.idempotency: Use PayPal-Request-Id header for safe retries

v6_pattern.onApprove: async (data) => { try { await capture(data.orderId); } catch (e) { showError('Payment failed'); } }

debugging.paypal_debug_id: Unique identifier for support requests — always log and include in error reports
